title: Tensura Boost Regen Aura
description: A datapack that makes you regen Aura scale on Aura max.
body:
Datapack for Tensura: Reincarnated

Very light double datapack that increase Aura You have a notification for every level

The calculation is based about your max Aura for the datapack.
Actually is based on your [Max x 0.001%]. (Thats work like the Magicule Absorption I for each level)

Example: You have 1.000.000, which gives you +10 Aura. So you have as base regen for Aura 11 ( 10 level + 1 default ).

It functions using a scoreboard.
